name: Nargisi Puri
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Potatoes, boiled, peeled, and mashed
Ghee; or oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Knead together the mashed eggs, potatoes, coriander, chilies, and 2 teaspoons salt until well combined.
2. Divide the mixture into 8 portions.
3. Sieve the flour and add 1 teaspoon salt to it. Rub 2 tablespoons ghee or oil into the flour mixture until well incorporated.
4. Gradually add warm water, kneading the dough for about 10 minutes until soft.
5. Divide the dough into 8 equal parts and shape each into a ball.
6. Roll out each ball slightly, place one portion of egg mixture in the center, fold it over, and pinch the ends to seal.
7. Roll each into a round puri that is approximately 4 inches (10 cm) in diameter. Ensure the dough is not too thin so that the stuffing does not fall out.
8. Heat oil for deep frying in a frying pan and fry one puri at a time until golden brown.
9. Serve hot with plain yogurt.
Cooking time: 25 minutes
